title: Al's Bird Elytra (Robin Wings)
description: Make your Elytra look like robin wings!
body:
Have you ever looked for a resource pack to give your Elytra a more bird-y look, but couldn't find one? Me too! So, I decided to make my own!

This pack will make any Elytra appear as a pair of feathered, red and gray robin wings, including new textures for both the regular and the broken Elytra icons in your inventory. :-)
Hopefully I will come out with different bird wings in the future, too!

by the way i want to clarify that the title does not say ai. it says al. my name is al. i made these textures myself. DON'T GET IT TWISTED!!!

support me on [twitter](https://x.com/4PPLEC0RE) or [bsky](https://bsky.app/profile/4pplec0re.bsky.social), if u want :-D
